title: Order Queue by Urgency and Time
description: The system shall order the queue items first by urgency (highest to lowest) and then by time (oldest to newest).
rationale: To ensure that users address the most urgent items first while maintaining a chronological order within the same urgency level.
business_value: Improves efficiency by ensuring that critical issues are addressed promptly, reducing response times for high-priority tasks.

source.description: As a user I need the system to order the queue by urgency then time so that I can address the most urgent items first and maintain chronological order within same urgency.

acceptance_criteria: Given there is a queue with items of varying urgencies and timestamps
When the queue is ordered by urgency then time
Then the items are sorted first by urgency (highest to lowest) and then by time (oldest to newest)
postconditions: The queue is sorted correctly based on the specified criteria
functional_constraints: Sorting algorithm must handle multiple sorting levels (urgency first, then time)
Urgency levels must be defined and interpretable (e.g., high, medium, low)

non_functional_requirements.performance: Response time should be optimized to minimize user wait times
non_functional_requirements.availability: System must be available at least 99.9% of the time
non_functional_requirements.scalability: The system should be able to handle an increase in queue size by a factor of 10 within 24 hours
non_functional_requirements.usability: Error messages should be clear and actionable, providing guidance on how to resolve issues

edge_cases: What happens when there are no items in the queue?
How does the system handle ties in urgency and time (e.g., same timestamp, same urgency level)?
What if an item's urgency or timestamp is updated while it is in the queue?

interfaces.name: Queue Storage
interfaces.description: The requirement interacts with the database to retrieve and store queue items.

test_cases.description: Verify that an empty queue is returned when there are no items.
test_cases.expected_result: An empty list or array should be returned.

test_cases.description: Verify the correct sorting of a queue with multiple items of different urgencies and timestamps.
test_cases.expected_result: Items should be sorted first by urgency (highest to lowest) and then by time (oldest to newest).

test_cases.description: Verify handling of ties in urgency and time with the same timestamp, same urgency level.
test_cases.expected_result: Items should be sorted based on a secondary criterion if urgencies are equal.
